============================================
VERCEL ENVIRONMENT VARIABLES
============================================

Open this URL and add each variable:
https://vercel.com/violet-archers-projects/agency-inc-dashboard/settings/environment-variables

For each variable:
1. Click "Add Another"
2. Enter the Key and Value
3. Check: Production, Preview, Development
4. Click "Save"

============================================
AFTER ADDING ALL VARIABLES:
============================================

1. Redeploy: vercel --prod

2. Update Auth0 Application Settings:
   - Allowed Callback URLs: https://agency-inc-dashboard.vercel.app/api/auth/callback
   - Allowed Logout URLs: https://agency-inc-dashboard.vercel.app
   - Allowed Web Origins: https://agency-inc-dashboard.vercel.app

3. Set up custom domain (app.authskye.org) for passkey support

4. After custom domain is set up, update AUTH0_BASE_URL to:
   https://app.authskye.org
